narrative:
Westerville 4-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,771 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
